episodes.title: Pritzker says he never met Jeffrey Epstein after questions arise in hearing
episodes.description: Former President Bill Clinton mentioned Illinois Gov. J.B. Pritzker during a House Oversight Committee hearing over the investigation into Jeffrey Epstein, and Mary Ann Ahern has the details on after the governor said the former president made a mistake in doing so.

episodes.title: Thomas Pritzker resigns as Hyatt chief over Jeffrey Epstein association
episodes.description: The chairman of Chicago-based Hyatt Hotels is stepping down from his position as executive chairman over his association with Jeffrey Epstein. Bennett Haeberle has more on this breaking story.
